pubad1-11.lens: Both halves are compulsory: ideal type's relevance AND the post-Weberian arc ending at the NWS — skipping Pollitt & Bouckaert costs the differentiator marks.
pubad1-11.conc: Weber's cage has not been escaped but **re-furnished** — the Neo-Weberian State keeps the iron of legality while opening a window to the citizen.

diag.d: Weber ideal type → dysfunctions (Merton/Michels) → NPM revolt (Hood) → Neo-Weberian State (rule-of-law + citizen-orientation)

flash: Cage closed via **success**: calculability, merit (*UPSC, Art 311*)
wf: Retain **legality and merit** while grafting on **responsiveness, digital transparency and outcome accountability** — reform, don't dismantle, the frame.

intro.x: *Max Weber's* legal-rational bureaucracy — hierarchy, written rules, impersonality, merit, fixed jurisdiction — is an **ideal type**, a yardstick rather than a photograph. He feared its perfection would trap modernity in an **iron cage** of rationality; the statement holds the cage closed because bureaucracy *worked*.
The **iron cage** is rationality **over-achieving, not failing** — bureaucracy's calculability succeeded so completely that rule-bound order became inescapable.

body.h: The ideal type's success — and the cage it built

p.x: displaced traditional and charismatic rule — obedience to impersonal rules, not persons (*sine ira et studio*).
written records and fixed jurisdiction made the state predictable — the root of its legitimacy.
professionalised administration — *Indian bridge:* **UPSC recruitment, Art 311** protections.
an analytic measure reality never equals — Weber described a tendency, not a destiny.
Success bred **dysfunction**: *Merton* — **goal displacement**; *Michels* — **iron law of oligarchy**.
rules become ends — *Peter Principle, Parkinson's Law*, red tape as rationality **over-achieving, not failing**.
(*Hood, 1991*): markets and managerialism attacked rule-boundness — but agencification **fragmented accountability** into a 'hollow state'.
(*Pollitt & Bouckaert, 2004*): reaffirm the state, rule-of-law and merit — **add citizen-orientation, results-focus and professional service culture**.
The NWS is **synthesis, not surrender** — Weber's skeleton with a service-delivery face.
*Indian bridge:* **Mission Karmayogi** re-tools the steel frame with competencies; **e-Office** digitises the file, not the law — though algorithmic rules risk a **digital iron cage**.

pubad1-7.lens: ✓ Imported from your verified answer bank (pa1-04, match 87%).
pubad1-7.conc: The New Public Service restores democratic legitimacy to administration, but works best as a constitutional correction to—rather than wholesale rejection of—managerial competence.

intro.x: The New Public Service rejects the market analogy as the master model of government: administrators serve citizens who possess rights and collectively define the public interest.

p.x: Denhardt and Denhardt replace steering and customer satisfaction with democratic citizenship and shared responsibility.
It is created through dialogue and contestation, not assumed to equal aggregated individual preferences.
Officials facilitate, negotiate and build capacity rather than merely command or contract out.
Multiple constitutional, legal, professional, community and political obligations outrank a single performance bottom line.
People are co-authors and rights-bearers; inconvenient users cannot be discarded as unprofitable customers.
Participatory planning, social audit, co-production and deliberative digital platforms express its logic.
Dialogue can be slow, unequal voices can dominate and emergencies still require authoritative coordination.
Service quality and measurement remain useful when subordinated to equity, due process and public purpose.
Participation without information, facilitation and responsive institutions becomes symbolic consultation.

pubad1-13.lens: ✓ Imported from your verified answer bank (pa1-08, match 80%).
pubad1-13.conc: Follett offers not soft consensus but a disciplined method of creating coordinated power; her relevance grows as government depends on actors it cannot simply command.

intro.x: Follett anticipated collaborative governance by treating conflict, authority and coordination as relational processes rather than fixed properties of hierarchy.

p.x: Orders should arise from objective requirements jointly discovered, depersonalising command without denying expertise.
Conflict should seek a new solution satisfying underlying interests rather than domination or splitting the difference.
Joint capacity is superior to power-over because participation enlarges rather than merely redistributes control.
Actors continuously shape one another; administration is interactive rather than a one-way chain of causation.
Direct contact, early coordination, reciprocal relations and continuity connect specialised units.
Diversity becomes a creative resource when institutions enable genuine encounter and collective purpose.
Networks, co-production, interdepartmental teams and negotiated regulation operationalise her ideas.
Integration may be impossible under deep power asymmetry, incompatible values or urgent coercive responsibility.
Collaboration needs clear public authority, inclusive representation and transparent accountability to avoid insider capture.

pubad1-38.lens: ✓ Imported from your verified answer bank (pa1-23, match 73%).
pubad1-38.conc: Plural control strengthens accountability only when it is additive: legality and participation must reinforce the legislature's power of authorisation, finance and political responsibility.

intro.x: The expansion of judicial and citizen oversight corrects executive dominance, but cannot replace the legislature as the continuous democratic principal of administration.

p.x: Fewer sittings, weak committee referral, guillotined grants and party discipline compress detailed scrutiny.
Government controls information, agenda and expertise, while individual legislators often lack research support.
Courts enforce legality and rights and can remedy administrative inaction, but intervene episodically through cases.
RTI, social audit, media and civil society supply dispersed information and continuous pressure.
Multiple forums reduce monopoly, protect minorities and expose failures hidden from partisan legislatures.
Judicial management may lack operational competence; organised voices may not represent the least powerful.
Neither judges nor NGOs authorise taxation, budgets or government tenure through electoral responsibility.
Mandatory committee scrutiny, research staff, action-taken reporting and protected opposition time can revive legislative capacity.
Courts and citizens should feed evidence into, not displace, a strengthened representative chain.

pubad1-45.lens: ✓ Imported from your verified answer bank (pa1-24, match 80%).
pubad1-45.conc: Natural justice is unwritten not optional: its adaptable core ensures that administrative necessity remains bounded by participation, impartiality and reasons.

intro.x: Natural justice supplies the minimum procedural morality of administrative power, preventing convenience or delegated authority from becoming arbitrary condemnation.

p.x: Audi alteram partem requires notice, disclosure of material and a meaningful opportunity to answer.
Nemo judex bars decision-makers with pecuniary, personal, departmental or reasonable apprehension of bias.
Speaking orders demonstrate application of mind, enable appeal and discipline discretionary power.
The principles moved beyond courts to administrative decisions affecting rights, interests and legitimate expectations.
Content varies with statute, urgency, subject matter, stakes and feasible safeguards; fairness is contextual.
Emergency, confidentiality, impracticability or legislative action may modify prior hearing, but not create a blanket licence.
It may cure urgent temporary action only when prompt, genuine review remains capable of correction.
Prejudice and useless-formality doctrines prevent automatic invalidation, yet authorities cannot presume hearing would never matter.
Automated decisions require notice, intelligible reasons, data correction and human review.
